titleStmt.title: Vatican City, Biblioteca Apostolica Vaticana, Aeth. 90
Mǝʿrāf

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Mǝʿrāf
Chants for the office of the evening for the vigils and for selected feasts
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the vigil of the feast of John the Baptist
msItem.incipit: ንዌጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ምዕራፍ። ስብሐት፡ ለአብ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለወልድ፡ ስብሐት፡ ለመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ይእዜኒ፡ ወዘልፈኒ፡ ወለዓለእ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ አሜን፡ ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሥሉስ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው፡ ተሣሃለነ፡ በመሓትወ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ወበጌና፡ ምዕራፍ። ቅዱስ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቅዱስ፡ ኀያል፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ዘተወልደ፡ እማርያም። እምቅድስት፡ ድንግል፡ ተሣሃለነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ቅዱስ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ኃያል፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ዘተጠምቀ፡ በዮርዳኖስ፡ ወተሰቅለ፡ ዲበ፡ ዕፀ፡ መስቀል፡ ተሣሃለነ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ቅዱስ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ቅዱስ፡ ኃያል፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሕያው፡ ዘኢይመውት፡ ዘተንሥዓ፡ እሙታን፡ አመ፡ ሣልስት፡ ዕለት፡ ዓርገ፡ በስብሐት፡ ውስተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ወነበረ፡ በየማነ፡ አቡሁ፡ ዳግመ፡ ይመጽእ፡ በስብሐት፡ ይኰንን፡ ሕያዋነ፡ ወሙታነ፡

msItem.title: Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of John the Baptist (ዘዮሐንስ፡)
ጌና፡
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the sabbaths and the common feasts (ዘሰንበት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Cross (ዘመስቀል፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Flowers (ዘጽጌ፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Four Beasts (ዘ፬እንስሳ፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of St Michael and the Angels (ዘመላእክት፡ ወዘሚካኤል፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Heavenly Priests (ዘካህናት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Righteous (ዘጻድቃን፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the preaching (ዘስብከት፡), for the first Sunday of Advent
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Light (ዘብርሃን፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Shepherd (ዘኖላዊ፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for Christmas (ዘልደት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of Baptism (ዘጥምቀት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Beginning of the Fast (ዘቀበላ፡ [ጾም፡])
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Holy Sunday (ዘቅድስት፡), i.e. the second of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Sunday of the Temple (ዘምኵራብ፡), i.e. the third of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Sunday of the Paralytic (ዘመፃጕዕ፡), i.e. the fourth of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Sunday of the Mount of Olives (ዘደብረ፡ ዘይት፡), i.e. the fifth of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Sunday of the Good Servant and Nicodemus (ዘገብር፡ ኄር፡ ወዘኒቆዲሞስ፡), i.e. the sixth and seventh Sundays of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Palm Sunday (ዘሆሳዕና፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of Resurrection (ዘትንሣኤ፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Martyrs (ዘሰማዕት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Birth of Mary (ዘልደታ [ለማርያም]፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the Ascension Day (ዘዕርገት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Paraclete (ዘጰራቅሊጦስ፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Righteous
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Apostles (ዘሐዋርያት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of winter (ዘክረምት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of St Cyriacus (ዘቂርቆስ፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Transfiguration on Mount Tabor (ዘደብረ፡ ታቦር፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the congregation on Mount Tabor (ዘማኅበር፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the firstborn
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Women (ዘአንስት፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Death of Mary (ዘፍልሰታ፡ [ለማርያም፡])
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Virgins (ዘማርያም፡ ወደናግል፡)
Mǝʿrāf: Abreham
Mǝʿrāf: Hymn for the feast of the Fruits (ዘፍሬ፡)

msItem.note:
The section concludes with a liturgical directive:
ወእምዝ፡ አንብብ፡ ወንጌል፡ ወድኅሬሁ፡ ኪዳን፡ ወሰላም፡ ወድኅሬሁ፡ እግዚኦ፡ መሐረነ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ በል፨ አድኅነነ፡ ሕዝበከ፡ ወባርከነ፡ ርስተከ፡ ሀበነ፡ ኃይለ፡ ወመዊዓ፡ ለአግብርቲከ፡ ለእለ፡ ይጼውዕ፡
ስመከ፡ ዕቀበነ፡ ለውሉደ፡ ሕዝብከ፡ ወሕፅረነ፡ በኃይለ፡ መላእክቲከ፡ ወትረ፡ በኵሉ፡ ጊዜ፡ ወበኵሉ፡ ሰዓት፡ በኃይለ፡ መስቀልከ፡ ርድአነ፡ ወበዕፀ፡ መስቀልከ፡ ቤዝወነ፡ .

msItem.title: ፀወኒ፡ ዘስብሐት፡
Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Monday evening
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 1, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 2, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 50.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Tuesday evening
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 31, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 32, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 50.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Wednesday evening
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 63, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 64.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Thursday evening
msItem.note: The office, erroneously attributed to Wednesday, contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 81, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 82.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Friday evening
msItem.note: The office, erroneously attributed to Thursday, contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 111, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 112.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Saturday morning
msItem.note: The office, erroneously attributed to Friday, contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 131, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 132.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of Saturday evening
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 1, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 2.

msItem.title: Chants and psalms to be recited for the office of the Sunday evening
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 148, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 149, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 150.

msItem.title: ዘዘወትር፡ ዕዝል፡ መስተብቍዕ፡
msItem.note: The section contains the following biblical readings: excerpts from Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 62, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 91, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 9, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 64; then Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 58, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 5, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 64, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 62; excerpts concerning the angels for the feasts of St Michael and the angels; Book of Habakkuk 3:1-19: Wangel za-Luqās 1:46-54, 68-79 for the feast of Our Lady Mary; Daniel, Book of 3:52-56, 57-87 (with the title ዘዘወትር፡), Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 148, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 149, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 150 2, followed by the subscription ተፈጸመ፡ ምዕራፍ፡ ዘዘወትር፡. The Daniel, Book of 3:52-55 is repeated five times on with different musical notations for the single weekdays; Daniel, Book of 3:57-87, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 148, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 149, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 150; lastly, excerpts from Song of Songs 1:1-2:9.

msItem.title: መወድስ፡
Excerpts from Mazmura Dāwit to be recited before the readings in various feasts of the liturgical calendar
Tones in which psalms and litanies are sung.
For the sick
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 62 , Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 3, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 5.

msItem.title: For the pilgrims
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 39 , Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 40, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 41.

msItem.title: For the rain
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 42 , Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 43, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 44.

msItem.title: For the fruits of the earth
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 45 , Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 46, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 47.

msItem.title: For the water of the rivers
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 48 , Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 49, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 50.

msItem.title: For the king
msItem.note: The office contains: Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 117 , Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 91, Mazmura Dāwit: Psalmus 92.

msItem.title: Tones in which canticles, biblical passages, praises to Our Lady Mary and ʾAnqaṣa bǝrhān are sung.
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፤ ምዕራፍ፤ ዘሰናብት፤ በሰላመ፤ እግዚአብሔር፤ አሜን።

msItem.title: Chants for the office of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the first week of Lent (of Moses)
Office for the first Monday of Lent
Office for the first Tuesday of Lent
Office for the first Wednesday of Lent
Office for the first Thursday of Lent
Office for the first Friday of Lent
Office for the first Saturday of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the second week of Lent (of the Holy [Day])
Office for the second Monday of Lent
Office for the second Tuesday of Lent
Office for the second Wednesday of Lent
Office for the second Thursday of Lent
Office for the second Friday of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the third week of Lent (of the Temple)
Office for the third Monday of Lent
Office for the third Tuesday of Lent
Office for the third Wednesday of Lent
Office for the third Thursday of Lent
Office for the third Friday of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the fourth week of Lent (of the Paralytic)
Office for the fourth Monday of Lent
Office for the fourth Tuesday of Lent
Office for the fourth Wednesday of Lent
Office for the fourth Thursday of Lent
Office for the fourth Friday of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the fifth week of Lent (of Mount of Olives)
Office for the fifth Monday of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the sixth week of Lent (of the Good Servant)
Office for the sixth Monday of Lent
Mǝʿrāf: Chants for the seventh week of Lent (of Nicodemus)
Office for the seventh Monday of Lent
ምዕራፍ፡ ዘአርእስት፡
Excerpts and psalms for the office of the third hour
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 1 to 10.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 11 to 20.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 21 to 30.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 31 to 40.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 41 to 50.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 51 to 60.
Excerpts and psalms for the office of the sixth hour
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 61 to 70.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 71 to 80.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 81 to 90.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 91 to 100. The text terminates abruptly.

signatures.note: have been inserted as a protection around the text block.

handNote.desc: Many words are written in abbreviated form. Musical notation is written interlineally up to .

binding.decoNote: Two wooden boards with no leather.

bibl.title: Bybliothecae apostolicae Vaticanae codices manu scripti recensiti iussu Pii XI Pontificis maximi. Codices Aethiopici Vaticani et Borgiani, Barberinianus orientalis 2, Rossianus 865<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Enarratio codicum
Meʿerāf: Commun de l'office divin éthiopien pour toute l'année, Texte éthiopien avec variantes
Patrologia Orientalis

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
